title: Billie Jean
youtube_query: Michael Jackson Billie Jean official audio
notes: Hooktheory and GetSongKEY confirm F# minor (Dorian feel in verses). Automated tools often report B minor or D major — all related keys. BPM 117 consistent across sources.

title: Smells Like Teen Spirit
youtube_query: Nirvana Smells Like Teen Spirit official music video
notes: FLAG: Hooktheory + theory analysis say F minor (4A). Automated tools (Tunebat, SongBPM) say Db major (3B) — the relative major. Power-chord minor-key rock often triggers relative-major false positives.

title: Wonderwall
notes: Clean ground truth — F# minor, 87 BPM, 11A confirmed across SongBPM, GetSongBPM, AudioKeychain, and published sheet music.

title: Hotel California
notes: FLAG: tonal center is B minor (Hooktheory). Automated tools report D major (relative major) and 147 BPM (double-time). True pulse is ~74 BPM. Expect detector to register 147 — that will show as a BPM 'octave' match, not tight.

title: Blinding Lights
youtube_query: The Weeknd Blinding Lights official video
notes: FLAG: 171 BPM is uncontested. Key reported as C# major (3B) by most automated tools but functions in C# minor harmonically. The analyzer is likely to return C# major.

title: Levitating
youtube_query: Dua Lipa Levitating official music video
notes: Strong cross-source agreement: F# minor, 103 BPM, 11A. One of the cleanest EDM-adjacent entries.

title: Don't Stop Believin'
youtube_query: Journey Don't Stop Believin' official audio
notes: Strong agreement: E major, 12B. BPM 118-119 across sources.

title: Sweet Child O' Mine
youtube_query: Guns N' Roses Sweet Child O' Mine official music video
notes: FLAG: guitars tuned Eb standard so sounding pitch is Db major (3B). Some sources report F#/Gb major (tab-position naming). AudioKeychain confirms 3B. 125 BPM consistent.

title: Lose Yourself
youtube_query: Eminem Lose Yourself official music video
notes: FLAG: Hooktheory + sheet music say D minor (7A). Automated tools say D major (10B) and 171 BPM (double-time). True pulse is 86 BPM.

title: Titanium
youtube_query: David Guetta Sia Titanium official video
notes: Replaced Bohemian Rhapsody (modulates through 4+ keys). Titanium stays in C minor throughout. Four independent sources agree: C minor, 126 BPM, 5A.
